title: Support basic global constraints (#6551)
body:
This patch tries to fix #6551 , the global constraints features as defined in IEEE 1800-2023 section 18.5.8.

Summary of changes:

1. Global constraint detection: Added isGlobalConstrained flag to AstVar to identify variables participating in global constraints (constraints referencing other objects' members)
2. Constraint hoisting to top-level class: Use foreachMember() to extract constraints from nested member classes and evaluate them together at the top-level class, enabling cross-object constraint solving
3. MemberSel handling for nested member access: Implemented unwrap logic in visit(AstMemberSel) and modified visit(VarRef) to clone MemberSel trees and build complete access paths (e.g., m1.inner.val) for proper SMT variable declaration

Known issue:

CI reports a memory leak, likely due to cloned VarRef nodes within MemberSel trees not being properly freed.
Assistance from the community on resolving this would be appreciated.
